task: Move the bluye cloth close to the silver bowl.
raw:
**SCENE ANALYSIS - A wooden countertop has a metal bowl, a blue cloth on a yellow towel, and a fork. The blue cloth is on the right side of the bowl. STRATEGY - First, reach for the blue cloth to grasp it. Then, transport it to the left side of the metal bowl. Finally, place it there. Failure modes include dropping the cloth during transport or placing it incorrectly. AFFORDANCE REASONING - Step 1 reach the cloth at its body for a stable grasp; Step 2 grasp the cloth's body for secure hold; Step 3 transport the cloth to the left of the bowl; Step 4 place the cloth on the countertop to the left of the bowl.**
Goal: on(blue_cloth, left_of(metal_bowl))
Scene: metal_bowl, blue_cloth, yellow_towel, fork
Step 1: reach(blue_cloth)
  affordance_region: the body of the blue cloth
  contact: gripper_state(open) [progress]
  spatial: distance(gripper, blue_cloth, <, 0.03) [completion]
  direction: approach_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: distance(gripper, blue_cloth) < 0.03
Step 2: grasp(blue_cloth)
  affordance_region: the body of the blue cloth
  contact: holding(blue_cloth) [completion]
  direction: grasp_axis(0, 0, -1) [progress]
  done_when: holding(blue_cloth)
Step 3: transport(blue_cloth -> left_of(metal_bowl))
  affordance_region: an empty area on the countertop to the left of the metal bowl
  spatial: above(blue_cloth, left_of(metal_bowl), 0.05) [completion]
  safety: no_drop(blue_cloth)
  done_when: above(blue_cloth, left_of(metal_bowl), 0.05)
Step 4: place(blue_cloth -> left_of(metal_bowl))
  affordance_region: an empty area on the countertop to the left of the metal bowl
  contact: surface_contact(blue_cloth, left_of(metal_bowl)) [completion]; released(blue_cloth) [completion]
  pose: stable(blue_cloth) [completion]
  done_when: surface_contact(blue_cloth, left_of(metal_bowl)) AND released(blue_cloth)
<END_OF_PLAN>

steps.affordance_region: the body of the blue cloth
the body of the blue cloth
an empty area on the countertop to the left of the metal bowl
an empty area on the countertop to the left of the metal bowl
